market_summary: Positive regime favors contained bullish behavior, especially if price holds near supportive structure.
trigger_short: Risk rises if price drives toward 6,800.00
avoid_text: Avoid chasing extended upside far away from the call wall or after momentum is already spent.
primary_setup: Primary setup: look for conservative calls only if price is holding firm and interacting with the call-side structure. Historical playbook favors morning call behavior.
secondary_setup: Secondary setup: if no clean bullish confirmation appears, treat the market as contained and wait for a better level test.
avoid_condition: Avoid aggressive puts in a positive regime unless price materially deteriorates toward the flip or lower structure.
manual_commentary: Possible headline-driven hesitation near the open. Watch if this aligns with any macro repricing.
headline_commentary: Need to verify whether any breaking macro or tariff-related headline was active.
